purpose: Author 4-layer memory architecture blueprint for AIER Code; inherit AIER Ops L1-L4 pattern; share Supabase DB with namespace aier_code_*; design only (no code, no migration)

phases.name: Pre-flight + research (canon + Task 1 + Task 2 + Day 1 audit)
phases.outcome: git pull rebase clean; design branch created from HEAD 58965ff; read Whitepaper V3 §6.2 (5-layer cognitive memory) + AIER Complete Blueprint v2 §5.5 + Memory Spec V1 ACTIVE canon (V0 repo-backed) + Day 1 audit (290 chunks across 7 groups) + Task 2 heartbeat checker + identity marker

phases.name: Author blueprint sections 1-10 + references (single doc)
phases.outcome: docs/architecture/BRAIN_BLUEPRINT_AIER_CODE.md ~30K chars; 11 sections (10 required + 1 references); 4-layer L1-L4 + L0 + UDNA + heartbeat mapping; ASCII diagram; 4 query examples (L4/L2/L3/L1); migration SQL DDL preview; 4 NTS decision questions; explicit V0 repo-memory ↔ V1+ DB-brain coexistence reconciliation

phases.name: Commit + push + open PR (design branch → main)
phases.outcome: PENDING — single commit on design branch + push + gh pr create --base main

key_design_decisions.share_db_with_aier_ops: NTS Q1 verbatim: 'AIER chung 1 database trên Supabase'. 1 Supabase project, 2 logical namespaces (aier_ops_* / aier_code_*). Sovereignty via namespace, not infra.
key_design_decisions.5_tables: aier_code_udna + aier_code_lineage (Task 1 EXISTS) + aier_code_knowledge_chunks (L1) + aier_code_episodic_events (L2) + aier_code_semantic_facts (L3) + aier_code_procedural_tags (L4) — Task 4 will create the 4 NEW
key_design_decisions.v0_v1_coexistence: AIER Code Memory Spec V1 (ACTIVE canon, NTS approved 2026-04-26) defines V0 repo-backed memory. This blueprint extends to V1+ DB-backed brain. V0 stays cold-start truth; V1+ extends for runtime cognition. Repo wins on conflict.
key_design_decisions.decision_layer_folded_into_L2: Whitepaper V3 §6.2.4 specs Decision Memory as separate cognitive layer; blueprint folds into L2 episodic with event_type='decision' (simpler, AIER Ops pattern; one-fewer-table). Q4 to NTS as decision point.
key_design_decisions.L0_deferred_phase_2: Query classifier needs LLM-tuned routing; defer Phase 2. Phase 1 callers query layers directly. Q3 to NTS.
key_design_decisions.build_order_tuan_1_L1_only: 290 chunks ingest + pgvector smoke test = manageable Tuần 1 scope. L2-L4 Tuần 2-3. Q2 to NTS.
key_design_decisions.inheritance_pattern: L0/L1/L2/L3/L4 from AIER Ops (R-INHERIT-03 — NO rebuild). Explicit map back to V3 §6.2 5-layer (Identity in UDNA; Episodic→L2; Semantic→L3; Decision→L2 events; System→L0+heartbeat).
key_design_decisions.RLS_per_layer: Postgres RLS policies on aier_code_* tables; JWT scope = aier_code:read | aier_code:write; mirror Task 1 UDNA pattern.

nts_decision_questions: Q1: Table prefix aier_code_* OK? (A=OK / B=Postgres schema / C=other prefix)
Q2: Build order Tuần 1 = L1 only OK? (A=L1 only / B=L1+L2 parallel / C=all 4 aggressive)
Q3: L0 Interface defer Phase 2 OK? (A=defer / B=minimal Phase 1 / C=full Phase 1)
Q4: Decision Memory fold into L2 or separate L5? (A=fold into L2 / B=separate L5 / C=defer Phase 2)
